text.title: Compliance Traceability Pack Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Compliance Traceability Pack application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Every requirement linked to ≥1 regulation clause AND every applicable clause linked to ≥1 requirement.

rationale.source: Compliance Traceability Pack authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: One-direction maps hide gaps; bidirectional catches both 'unbacked clause' and 'orphan requirement'.

rule.statement: Each control has named evidence (artefact + location + collection cadence).

rationale.source: Compliance Traceability Pack authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Controls without evidence fail audit; cadence prevents staleness.

rule.statement: Each control names an accountable owner (handle / role).

rationale.source: Compliance Traceability Pack authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Unowned controls go stale; named owner enables audit follow-up.

rule.statement: Pack carries semver + last_reviewed; clause-set changes trigger a delta record.

rationale.source: Compliance Traceability Pack authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Regulations move; stale packs mislead auditors.

rule.statement: Pack exports to a regulator-friendly format (CSV / Excel / PDF) on demand.

rationale.source: Compliance Traceability Pack authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Internal-only formats fail at audit time; export is the deliverable shape.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.
